# Medical Debt Rights - Protection & Relief [2026] - Medicaldebtrights
> Last updated: 2026-05-01

> Know your medical debt rights. New credit reporting rules, charity care, negotiation, and bankruptcy options for medical bills. 2026 g...

## About
medicaldebtrights.com is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Charity Care Requirements for Hospitals - Medicaldebtrights: https://medicaldebtrights.com/charity-care-requirements.html
- Medical Debt Collection Limits - Medicaldebtrights: https://medicaldebtrights.com/collection-limits.html
- Medical Debt Credit Reporting Rules - Medicaldebtrights: https://medicaldebtrights.com/credit-reporting-rules.html
- Disputing Medical Bills - Medicaldebtrights: https://medicaldebtrights.com/dispute-process.html
- Fair Medical Billing Practices - Medicaldebtrights: https://medicaldebtrights.com/fair-billing.html
- Medical Financial Assistance Programs - Medicaldebtrights: https://medicaldebtrights.com/financial-assistance.html
- Medical Debt Rights - Protection & Relief [2026] - Medicaldebtrights: https://medicaldebtrights.com/
- Insurance Appeal Rights for Medical Bills - Medicaldebtrights: https://medicaldebtrights.com/insurance-appeals.html
- State Medical Debt Protections - Medicaldebtrights: https://medicaldebtrights.com/state-protections.html
- Surprise Medical Billing Protections - Medicaldebtrights: https://medicaldebtrights.com/surprise-billing.html
- Privacy Policy: https://medicaldebtrights.com/privacy.html

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
